Home.badge: Faster than the old scheduling grid
Home.title: Find the overlap without the chaos.
Home.subtitle: WhenWeMeet turns rough availability into a clear, bilingual heatmap your whole group can act on.
Home.createDescription: Set the date range, timezone and daily window once. Share the link and let everyone paint their availability.

previewPoints.0: Drag or tap to paint availability on desktop and mobile.
previewPoints.1: See best windows instantly with a readable intensity scale.
previewPoints.2: Switch Korean and English without losing context.

Event.shareHint: Send this link to your group.
Event.joinDescription: Enter the name you want everyone else to see.
Event.noBestTimes: Once people add availability, the strongest overlaps will appear here.
Event.emptyState: No one has filled out availability yet.
Event.missingSupabase: Supabase is not configured yet. Add env vars before using live event data.
Event.manageNote: Selections save to Supabase through server actions, so participants can stay login-free.

Errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Errors.missingFields: Please fill in every required field.
Errors.invalidTimeRange: The daily end time must be after the start time.
Errors.invalidDateRange: The end date must be the same day or later than the start date.
Errors.supabaseMissing: Supabase env vars are missing in this environment.
Errors.eventMissing: This event does not exist or is no longer available.
Errors.participantMissing: Join the event before saving availability.
Errors.saveFailed: We could not save availability right now.
